_meta.title: Saints & Monsters — Magic & Denizen Boon hooks
_meta.note: Transcribe full Boon ladders from the PDF into this file over time; Magic and Denizen Purview entries here are starting anchors.

magic_assumption_godform.name: Assumption of the Godform
magic_assumption_godform.description: Imbue 1 Legend — for the scene gain Enhancement 3 on Sorcery rolls for spells tied to any other Purview you have.
magic_assumption_godform.mechanicalEffects: Cost: Imbue 1 Legend. Duration: One scene. Subject: Self.

magic_bend_fate.name: Bend Fate
magic_bend_fate.description: Spend 1+ Legend to subtly alter an ongoing ritual, curse, or magical effect you know — one brief phrase alteration; cost 1 Legend per Tier of the effect.
magic_bend_fate.mechanicalEffects: Spend 1+ Legend. Range: Close. See S&M p. 79.

magic_thrice_great.name: Thrice-Great
magic_thrice_great.description: Imbue 2 Legend — during extended rituals, each Milestone completed allows a Feat of Scale without spending Legend on mystical-knowledge rolls.
magic_thrice_great.mechanicalEffects: Imbue 2 Legend. Reflexive. Until ritual completes.

denizen_earth_animate_placeholder.name: Animate Earth (Denizen)
denizen_earth_animate_placeholder.description: Imbue or spend Legend to animate earth as a mindless construct (professional) under your control — full stats in S&M pp. 45–46.
denizen_earth_animate_placeholder.mechanicalEffects: Placeholder Boon row for chargen UI — confirm costs and construct tags with PDF.
